source.title: Transformation of Temu's Ecosystem Behind the Semi-Managed Model

extractions.claim: Temu's semi-managed model accounted for ~20% of GMV in 2024 and is growing rapidly, with up to 70% of platform traffic now directed toward semi-managed SKUs.
extractions.evidence: The transaction volume of the semi-managed model accounted for 20% of Temu's GMV in 2024. TEMU now prioritizes semi-managed products in both homepage exposure and search results. According to internal estimates, up to 70% of platform traffic is shifting toward semi-managed SKUs.

verification.verifier_notes: 20% GMV figure from multiple industry sources. 70% traffic shift from internal estimates cited by ChineSellers and TechBuzzChina.

extractions.claim: Semi-managed orders now represent 80% of Temu US sales post-tariff, as the platform pivoted aggressively away from cross-border direct ship.
extractions.evidence: Following the de minimis exemption's end, U.S. site traffic dropped 33% and daily GMV fell 50%, though semi-managed orders now represent 80% of sales.

verification.verifier_notes: The 80% figure appears in AMZPrep article context. The 33% traffic drop and 50% GMV drop are directionally consistent with other reports but exact figures may be estimates.

extractions.claim: Temu's self-operated warehouses in the US projected to handle 15-20% of total US goods volume in 2025, rising to 20-25% by 2026.
extractions.evidence: It is projected that by 2025, Temu's self-operated warehouses in the US will handle 15% to 20% of total US goods volume, and this proportion may increase to 20% to 25% by 2026.

verification.verifier_notes: Projection from Darwynn Fulfillment analysis. These are industry estimates, not Temu's official disclosure.

extractions.claim: Sources close to Temu's decision-makers said semi-managed services would match or surpass fully-managed in monthly sales within six months (as of mid-2025).
extractions.evidence: Sources close to Temu's decision-makers revealed that 'in the next six months, semi-managed services will match or even surpass fully-managed services in monthly sales.'

verification.verifier_notes: From ChineSellers Substack citing insider sources. Timeline suggests this was achieved by late 2025.
